faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Contract Medical Practitioner (GDMO) posts will be held on 23rd June 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from an institute recognized by the Indian Medical Council, along with a valid registration and completion of one year of compulsory rotatory internship.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Contract Medical Practitioner (GDMO) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Contract Medical Practitioner (GDMO) post is 60 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC categories, and retired doctors are eligible up to 65 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 95,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Contract Medical Practitioner (GDMO) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the Contract Medical Practitioner (GDMO) post in the East Coast Railway Khurda Road Division.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the East Coast Railway Khurda Road Division office. Specific details regarding the venue and reporting time will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual position. The job type is mentioned as 'Contract' in the official notification.
